scripts.lint: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/worker/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/worker-read/tsconfig.json && eslint .
scripts.lint:typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/worker/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/worker-read/tsconfig.json
scripts.sync: bun run build && NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 bun packages/cli/dist/bin.js sync --dev
scripts.sync:prod: bun run build && bun packages/cli/dist/bin.js sync
